items.title: Dow slides 800 points as sell-off ramps up following Trump's global tariff hike: Live updates
items.description: Wall Street is coming off a volatile session on Friday after the Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump’s tariffs.

items.title: Hedge Funds Are Buying Power From Caterpillar, (CAT) Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 10 Stocks On Jim Cramer’s Mind & His Thoughts On Enterprise AI. Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s mind. Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is an agricultural and construction machinery manufacturer. Its shares are up by a strong 123% over the past year and by 26% year-to-date. The firm […]
